revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from plural
  |name=From the plural form
  |from=a plural noun
  |to=its singular form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the singular form is "{{{of}}}"}}
  |info=** This redirect link is used for convenience; it is often preferable to add the plural directly after the link (for example, {{code|[[link]]s}}).  However, do not replace these redirected links with a simpler link unless the page is updated for another reason (see [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]).
** Use this rcat to tag {{em|only}} [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects; when plural forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects from plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from plural
  |name=From the plural form
  |from=a plural noun
  |to=its singular form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the singular form is "{{{of}}}"}}
  |info=** This redirect link is used for convenience; it is often preferable to add the plural directly after the link (for example, {{code|[[link]]s}}).  However, do not replace these redirected links with a simpler link unless the page is updated for another reason (see [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]).
** Use this rcat to tag {{em|only}} [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects; when plural forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects from plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from plural
  |name=From the plural form
  |from=a plural noun
  |to=its singular form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the singular form is "{{{of}}}"}}
  |info=** This redirect link is used for convenience; it is often preferable to add the plural directly after the link (for example, {{code|[[link]]s}}).  However, do not replace these redirected links with a simpler link unless the page is updated for another reason (see [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]).
** Use this rcat to tag {{em|only}} [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects; when plural forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects from plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from plural
  |name=From the plural form
  |from=a plural noun
  |to=its singular form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the singular form is "{{{of}}}"}}
  |info=** This redirect link is used for convenience; it is often preferable to add the plural directly after the link (for example, {{code|[[link]]s}}).  However, do not replace these redirected links with a simpler link unless the page is updated for another reason (see [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]).
** Use this rcat to tag {{em|only}} [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects; when plural forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects from plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from plural
  |name=From the plural form
  |from=a plural noun
  |to=its singular form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the singular form is "{{{of}}}"}}
  |info=** This redirect link is used for convenience; it is often preferable to add the plural directly after the link (for example, {{code|[[link]]s}}).  However, do not replace these redirected links with a simpler link unless the page is updated for another reason (see [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]).
** Use this rcat to tag {{em|only}} [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects; when plural forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects from plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R from plural |name=From the plural form |from=a plural noun |to=its singular form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the singular form is "{{{of}}}"}} |info=** This redirect link is used for convenience; it is often preferable to add the plural directly after the link (for example, {{code|[[link]]s}}). However, do not replace these redirected links with a simpler link unless the page is updated for another reason (see [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]). ** Use this rcat to tag {{em|only}} [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects; when plural forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}. |main category=Redirects from plurals |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}} }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from plural
  |name=From the plural form
  |from=a plural noun
  |to=its singular form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the singular form is "{{{of}}}"}}
  |info=** This redirect link is used for convenience; it is often preferable to add the plural directly after the link (for example, {{code|[[link]]s}}).  However, do not replace these redirected links with a simpler link unless the page is updated for another reason (see [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]).
** Use this rcat to tag {{em|only}} [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects; when plural forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects from plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>
<!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. -->
{{documentation}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24964547982|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}}
</noinclude>{{Redirect template
  |id=R from plural
  |name=From the plural form
  |from=a plural noun
  |to=its singular form{{#if:{{{of|}}}| or to a broader article; the singular form is "{{{of}}}"}}
  |info=** This redirect link is used for convenience; it is often preferable to add the plural directly after the link (for example, {{code|[[link]]s}}).  However, do not replace these redirected links with a simpler link unless the page is updated for another reason (see [[WP:NOTBROKEN]]).
** Use this rcat to tag {{em|only}} [[Wikipedia:Mainspace|mainspace]] redirects; when plural forms are found in other namespaces, use {{tl|R from modification}} {{em|instead}}.
  |main category=Redirects from plurals
  |printworthy={{#ifeq:{{{1}}}|printworthy|yes|no}}
}}<noinclude>

{{documentation}}

[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
